tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فذوقوا» العذاب «بما نسيتم لقاء يومكم هذا» أي بترككم الإيمان به «إنا نسيناكم» تركناكم في العذاب «وذوقوا عذاب الخلد» الدائم «بما كنتم تعملون» من الكفر والتكذيب
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَذُوقُواْ بِمَا نَسِيتُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ هَٰذَآ إِنَّا نَسِينَٰكُمۡۖ وَذُوقُواْ عَذَابَ ٱلۡخُلۡدِ بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka rasakanlah oleh kalian) azab ini (disebabkan kalian melupakan pertemuan dengan hari kalian ini) karena kalian tidak mau beriman kepadanya (sesungguhnya Kami telah melupakan kalian pula) maksudnya Kami tinggalkan kalian di dalam azab (dan rasakanlah siksa yang kekal) azab yang abadi (disebabkan apa yang selalu kalian kerjakan") akibat dari kekafiran dan kedustaan yang telah kalian kerjakan

ar: إِنَّمَا یُؤۡمِنُ بِءَایَـٰتِنَا ٱلَّذِینَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِهَا خَ̅رُّ̅و̅ا۟̅ ̅سُ̅جَّ̅دࣰ̅ا̅ وَسَبَّحُوا۟ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَهُمۡ لَا یَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ ۩
ar_simple: إِنَّمَا يُؤْمِنُ بِآيَاتِنَا الَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا بِهَا خَرُّوا سُجَّدًا وَسَبَّحُوا بِحَمْدِ رَبِّهِمْ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ ۩

t.sahih-int: Only those believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded by them, fall down in prostration and exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord, and they are not arrogant
t.asad: ONLY THEY [truly] believe in Our messages who, whenever they are conveyed to them, fall down, prostrating themselves in adoration, and extol their Sustainer’s limitless glory and praise; and who are never filled with false pride
t.yusuf-ali: Only those believe in Our Signs, who, when they are recited to them, fall down in prostration, and celebrate the praises of their Lord, nor are they (ever) puffed up with pride
t.pickthall: Only those believe in Our revelations who, when they are reminded of them, fall down prostrate and hymn the praise of their Lord, and they are not scornful
t.arberry: Only those believe in Our signs who, when they are reminded of them, fall down prostrate and proclaim the praise of their Lord, not waxing proud
t.hilali-khan: Only those believe in Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.), who, when they are reminded of them fall down prostrate, and glorify the Praises of their Lord, and they are not proud
t.itani: They believe in Our communications, those who, when reminded of them, fall down prostrate, and glorify their Lord with praise, and are not proud.
t.mubarakpuri: Only those believe in Our Ayat, who, when they are reminded of them, fall down prostrate, and glorify the praises of their Lord, and they are not proud.
t.qarib: True believers in Our signs are those who, when they are reminded of them, fall down in prostration, and praise their Lord's limitless glory, and do not think they are too arrogant to do it
t.wahiduddin: The people who truly believe in Our messages are those who fall to the ground in prostration when they are reminded of them, and glorify their Lord with praise and are not arrogant
t.shakir: Only they believe in Our communications who, when they are reminded of them, fall down in prostration and celebrate the praise of their Lord, and they are not proud
t.haleem: The only people who truly believe in Our messages are those who, when they are reminded of them, bow down in worship, cele-brate their Lord’s praises, and do not think themselves above this
t.maariful: Only those people believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded of them, fall in prostration and pronounce the purity and praise of their Lord, and who do not wax proud
t.khattab: The only ˹true˺ believers in Our revelation are those who—when it is recited to them—fall into prostration and glorify the praises of their Lord and are not too proud
t.ghali: Surely only they believe in Our signs who, when they are reminded of them, collapse constantly prostrating and extol with the praise of their Lord, and they do not wax proud.* A prostration is to be performed here
t.irving: The only ones who believe in Our signs are those who drop down kneeling [in worship] whenever they are reminded of them, and hymn their Lord´s praise. They do not act so proudly
t.iwq: Only those believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded by them, fall down in prostration and exalt Allah with praise of their Lord, and they are not arrogant

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya orang yang benar-benar percaya kepada ayat-ayat Kami adalah mereka yang apabila diperingatkan dengan ayat-ayat itu mereka segera bersujud seraya bertasbih dan memuji Rabbnya, dan lagi pula mereka tidaklah sombong.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya yang mempercayai ayat-ayat Kami adalah orang-orang yang, apabila diperingatkan dengan ayat-ayat Kami, langsung menyungkur sujud kepada Allah dan menyucikan-Nya dari segala kekurangan, serta selalu memuji-Nya dengan segala kesempurnaan-Nya. Dan mereka tidak sombong untuk tunduk kepada ayat-ayat ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman kepada ayat-ayat Kami) yakni Alquran (adalah orang-orang yang apabila diperingatkan) dinasihati (dengan ayat-ayat Kami mereka menyungkur sujud dan bertasbih) seraya (memuji Rabbnya) dengan mengucapkan kalimat, "Subhaanallaah wa bihamdihi" (sedangkan mereka tidak menyombongkan diri) lantaran beriman dan berlaku taat itu.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya orang yang benar-benar percaya kepada ayat-ayat Kami adalah mereka yang apabila diperingatkan dengan ayat-ayat itu mereka segera bersujud seraya bertasbih dan memuji Rabbnya, dan lagi pula mereka tidaklah sombong.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنما يؤمن بآياتنا» القرآن «الذين إذا ذُكِّروا» وعظوا «بها خرُّوا سجَّدا وسبَّحوا» متلبسين «بحمد ربهم» أي قالوا: سبحان الله وبحمده «وهم لا يستكبرون» عن الإيمان والطاعة
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّمَا يُؤۡمِنُ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُواْ بِهَا خَرُّواْۤ سُجَّدٗاۤ وَسَبَّحُواْ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَهُمۡ لَا يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ۩
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman kepada ayat-ayat Kami) yakni Alquran (adalah orang-orang yang apabila diperingatkan) dinasihati (dengan ayat-ayat Kami mereka menyungkur sujud dan bertasbih) seraya (memuji Rabbnya) dengan mengucapkan kalimat, "Subhaanallaah wa bihamdihi" (sedangkan mereka tidak menyombongkan diri) lantaran beriman dan berlaku taat itu

ar: تَتَجَافَىٰ جُنُوبُهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمَضَاجِعِ یَدۡعُونَ رَبَّهُمۡ خَوۡفࣰا وَطَمَعࣰا وَمِمَّا رَزَقۡنَـٰهُمۡ یُنفِقُونَ
ar_simple: تَتَجَافَىٰ جُنُوبُهُمْ عَنِ الْمَضَاجِعِ يَدْعُونَ رَبَّهُمْ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنْفِقُونَ

t.sahih-int: They arise from [their] beds; they supplicate their Lord in fear and aspiration, and from what We have provided them, they spend
t.asad: [and] who are impelled to rise from their beds [at night] to call out to their Sustainer in fear and hope; and who spend on others out of what We provide for them as sustenance
t.yusuf-ali: Their limbs do forsake their beds of sleep, the while they call on their Lord, in Fear and Hope: and they spend (in charity) out of the sustenance which We have bestowed on them
t.pickthall: Who forsake their beds to cry unto their Lord in fear and hope, and spend of that We have bestowed on them
t.arberry: Their sides shun their couches as they call on their Lord in fear and hope; and they expend of that We have provided them
t.hilali-khan: Their sides forsake their beds, to invoke their Lord in fear and hope, and they spend (charity in Allah's Cause) out of what We have bestowed on them
t.itani: Their sides shun their beds, as they pray to their Lord, out of reverence and hope; and from Our provisions to them, they give.
t.mubarakpuri: Their sides forsake their beds, to invoke their Lord in fear and hope, and they spend out of what We have bestowed on them.
t.qarib: They forsake their beds as they call upon their Lord in fear and hope, and they share with others from what We have provided them
t.wahiduddin: They forsake their beds, calling upon their Lord in fear and in hope, and spend out of what We have provided them with
t.shakir: Their sides draw away from (their) beds, they call upon their Lord in fear and in hope, and they spend (benevolently) out of what We have given them
t.haleem: Their sides shun their beds in order to pray to their Lord in fear and hope; they give to others some of what We have given them
t.maariful: Their sides remain apart from their beds. They call their Lord with fear and hope, and spend (in charity) out of what We have given to them
t.khattab: They abandon their beds, invoking their Lord with hope and fear, and donate from what We have provided for them
t.ghali: Their sides often shun (their) recumbencies (i.e., beds, places for reclining) to invoke their Lord in fear and in longing (from Him); and they expend of what We have provided them
t.irving: They slip quietly away from their beds to appeal to their Lord in fear and anticipation, and spend [charitably] whatever We have provided them with
t.iwq: They arise from their beds; they supplicate their Lord in fear and aspiration, and from what We have provided them, they spend

t_id.kemenag: Lambung mereka jauh dari tempat tidurnya dan mereka selalu berdoa kepada Rabbnya dengan penuh rasa takut dan harap, serta mereka menafkahkan apa apa rezeki yang Kami berikan.
t_id.sabiq: Lambung mereka selalu jauh dari tempat tidur untuk berdoa kepada Allah, dengan rasa takut dari murka-Nya dan mengharapkan kasih sayang-Nya. Mereka pun selalu menafkahkan harta yang Kami karuniakan di jalan kebaikan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lambung mereka jauh) diri mereka jauh (dari tempat tidurnya) dari tempat pembaringannya disebabkan mereka selalu melakukan salat tahajud di malam hari (sedangkan mereka berdoa kepada Rabbnya dengan rasa takut) akan azab-Nya (dan penuh harap) akan rahmat-Nya (dan mereka menafkahkan sebagian dari rezeki yang Kami berikan kepada mereka) yaitu menyedekahkannya.
t_id.iwq: Lambung mereka jauh dari tempat tidurnya dan mereka selalu berdoa kepada Rabbnya dengan penuh rasa takut dan harap, serta mereka menafkahkan apa apa rezeki yang Kami berikan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «تتجافى جنوبهم» ترتفع «عن المضاجع» مواضع الاضطجاع بفرشها لصلاتهم بالليل تهجدا «يدعون ربهم خوفا» من عقابه «وطمعا» في رحمته «ومما رزقناهم ينفقون» يتصدقون
tafsir.siraj-ar: تَتَجَافَىٰ جُنُوبُهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمَضَاجِعِ يَدۡعُونَ رَبَّهُمۡ خَوۡفٗا وَطَمَعٗا وَمِمَّا رَزَقۡنَٰهُمۡ يُنفِقُونَ (تَتَجَافَى: تَرْتَفِعُ، وَتَتَنحَّى لِلْعِبَادَةِ, الْمَضَاجِعِ: فُرُشِ النَّوْمِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lambung mereka jauh) diri mereka jauh (dari tempat tidurnya) dari tempat pembaringannya disebabkan mereka selalu melakukan salat tahajud di malam hari (sedangkan mereka berdoa kepada Rabbnya dengan rasa takut) akan azab-Nya (dan penuh harap) akan rahmat-Nya (dan mereka menafkahkan sebagian dari rezeki yang Kami berikan kepada mereka) yaitu menyedekahkannya

ar: فَلَا تَعۡلَمُ نَفۡسࣱ مَّاۤ أُخۡفِیَ لَهُم مِّن قُرَّةِ أَعۡیُنࣲ جَزَاۤءَۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ یَعۡمَلُونَ
ar_simple: فَلَا تَعْلَمُ نَفْسٌ مَا أُخْفِيَ لَهُمْ مِنْ قُرَّةِ أَعْيُنٍ جَزَاءً بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ

t.sahih-int: And no soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes as reward for what they used to do
t.asad: And [as for all such believers,] no human being can imagine what blissful delights, as yet hidden, await them [in the life to come] as a reward for all that they did
t.yusuf-ali: Now no person knows what delights of the eye are kept hidden (in reserve) for them - as a reward for their (good) deeds
t.pickthall: No soul knoweth what is kept hid for them of joy, as a reward for what they used to do
t.arberry: No soul knows what comfort is laid up for them secretly, as a recompense for that they were doing
t.hilali-khan: No person knows what is kept hidden for them of joy as a reward for what they used to do
t.itani: No soul knows what eye’s delight awaits them—a reward for what they used to do.
t.mubarakpuri: No person knows what is kept hidden for them of delights of eyes as a reward for what they used to do.
t.qarib: No soul knows what delight lies in store for them; a reward for what they have done
t.wahiduddin: No soul knows what joy is kept hidden in store for them as a reward for their labours
t.shakir: So no soul knows what is hidden for them of that which will refresh the eyes; a reward for what they did
t.haleem: No soul knows what joy is kept hidden in store for them as a reward for what they have done
t.maariful: So, no one knows the delight of eyes that has been reserved for them in secret, as a reward of what they used to do
t.khattab: No soul can imagine what delights are kept in store for them as a reward for what they used to do
t.ghali: So no self knows what is (kept) concealed for them in comfort of the eyes as a recompense for whatever they were doing
t.irving: No soul knows what comfort is hidden from their eyes as a reward for what they have been doing
t.iwq: And no soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes as reward for what they used to do

t_id.kemenag: Tak seorangpun mengetahui berbagai nikmat yang menanti, yang indah dipandang sebagai balasan bagi mereka, atas apa yang mereka kerjakan.
t_id.sabiq: Seseorang tidak akan dapat mengetahui banyaknya nikmat besar yang Allah sediakan dan simpan untuk mereka, yang dapat menyedapkan pandangan mereka, sebagai balasan atas ketaatan dan perbuatan yang mereka lakukan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Seorang pun tidak mengetahui apa yang disembunyikan) apa yang tersembunyi (bagi mereka yaitu berupa bermacam-macam nikmat yang menyedapkan pandangan mata) yakni nikmat-nikmat surga yang menyenangkan hati mereka. Menurut suatu qiraat lafal ukhfiya dibaca ukhfii, artinya apa yang Aku sembunyikan (sebagai balasan terhadap apa yang telah mereka kerjakan).
t_id.iwq: Tak seorangpun mengetahui berbagai nikmat yang menanti, yang indah dipandang sebagai balasan bagi mereka, atas apa yang mereka kerjakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلا تعلم نفسٌ ما أخفىَ» خبئ «لهم من قرة أعين» ما تقر به أعينهم، وفي قراءة بسكون الياء مضارع «جزاءً بما كانوا يعملون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَا تَعۡلَمُ نَفۡسٞ مَّآ أُخۡفِيَ لَهُم مِّن قُرَّةِ أَعۡيُنٖ جَزَآءَۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ (مَّا أُخْفِيَ لَهُم: مَا ادُّخِرَ لَهُمْ مِنَ الجَزَاءِ, مِّن قُرَّةِ أَعْيُنٍ: مَا يُفْرِحُ، وَيَسُرُّ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Seorang pun tidak mengetahui apa yang disembunyikan) apa yang tersembunyi (bagi mereka yaitu berupa bermacam-macam nikmat yang menyedapkan pandangan mata) yakni nikmat-nikmat surga yang menyenangkan hati mereka. Menurut suatu qiraat lafal ukhfiya dibaca ukhfii, artinya apa yang Aku sembunyikan (sebagai balasan terhadap apa yang telah mereka kerjakan)

ar: أَفَمَن كَانَ مُؤۡمِنࣰا كَمَن كَانَ فَاسِقࣰاۚ لَّا یَسۡتَوُۥنَ
ar_simple: أَفَمَنْ كَانَ مُؤْمِنًا كَمَنْ كَانَ فَاسِقًا ۚ لَا يَسْتَوُونَ

t.sahih-int: Then is one who was a believer like one who was defiantly disobedient? They are not equal
t.asad: Is, then, he who [in his earthly life] was a believer to be compared with one who was iniquitous? [Nay,] these two are not equal
t.yusuf-ali: Is then the man who believes no better than the man who is rebellious and wicked? Not equal are they
t.pickthall: Is he who is a believer like unto him who is an evil-liver? They are not alike
t.arberry: What? Is he who has been a believer like unto him who has been ungodly? They are not equal
t.hilali-khan: Is then he who is a believer like him who is Fasiq (disbeliever and disobedient to Allah)? Not equal are they
t.itani: Is someone who is faithful like someone who is a sinner? They are not equal.
t.mubarakpuri: Is then he who is a believer like him who is rebellious Not equal are they.
t.qarib: Is a believer the same as one who was defiantly disobedient? [No], they are not equal
t.wahiduddin: So, is someone who believes equal to someone who defies God? No, they are not equal
t.shakir: Is he then who is a believer like him who is a transgressor? They are not equal
t.haleem: So, is someone who believes equal to someone who defies God? No, they are not equal
t.maariful: So, can one who is a believer become like one who is a sinner? They cannot become equal
t.khattab: Is the one who is a believer equal ˹before Allah˺ to the one who is rebellious? They are not equal
t.ghali: So, is he who has been a believer like him who has been immoral? They are not equal
t.irving: Is someone who is a believer like someone who has been acting immorally"? They are not on the same footing
t.iwq: Then is one who was a believer like one who was defiantly disobedient? They are not equal

t_id.kemenag: Apakah orang-orang beriman itu sama dengan orang-orang yang fasik? Mereka tidak sama.
t_id.sabiq: Apakah balasan manusia itu sama, sedangkan perbuatan mereka berbeda-beda, sehingga orang yang beriman seperti orang yang kafir dan durhaka kepada-Nya? Mereka tidak akan sama!
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah orang-orang yang beriman sama seperti orang yang fasik? Mereka tidak sama) maksudnya orang-orang mukmin dan orang-orang fasik atau kafir itu tidak sama.
t_id.iwq: Apakah orang-orang beriman itu sama dengan orang-orang yang fasik? Mereka tidak sama.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أَفمن كان مؤمنا كمن كان فاسقا لا يستوون» أي المؤمنون والفاسقون
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَفَمَن كَانَ مُؤۡمِنٗا كَمَن كَانَ فَاسِقٗاۚ لَّا يَسۡتَوُۥنَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah orang-orang yang beriman sama seperti orang yang fasik? Mereka tidak sama) maksudnya orang-orang mukmin dan orang-orang fasik atau kafir itu tidak sama

ar: أَمَّا ٱلَّذِینَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمۡ جَنَّـٰتُ ٱلۡمَأۡوَىٰ نُزُلَۢا بِمَا كَانُوا۟ یَعۡمَلُونَ
ar_simple: أَمَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ فَلَهُمْ جَنَّاتُ الْمَأْوَىٰ نُزُلًا بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ

t.sahih-int: As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, for them will be the Gardens of Refuge as accommodation for what they used to do
t.asad: As for those who attain to faith and do righteous deeds - gardens of rest await them, as a welcome [from God], in result of what they did
t.yusuf-ali: For those who believe and do righteous deeds are Gardens as hospitable homes, for their (good) deeds
t.pickthall: But as for those who believe and do good works, for them are the Gardens of Retreat - a welcome (in reward) for what they used to do
t.arberry: As for those who believe, and do deeds of righteousness, there await them the Gardens of the Refuge, in hospitality for that they were doing
t.hilali-khan: As for those who believe (in the Oneness of Allah Islamic Monotheism) and do righteous good deeds, for them are Gardens (Paradise) as an entertainment, for what they used to do
t.itani: As for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for them are the Gardens of Shelter—hospitality for what they used to do.
t.mubarakpuri: As for those who believe and do righteous good deeds, for them are Gardens of Abode as an entertainment for what they used to do.
t.qarib: As for those who believed and did good deeds, there will be Gardens of Refuge for them as an accommodation for what they have done
t.wahiduddin: Those who believe and do good deeds shall be lodged in the Gardens of Paradise as a reward for what they have done
t.shakir: As for those who believe and do good, the gardens are their abiding-place; an entertainment for what they did
t.haleem: Those who believe and do good deeds will have Gardens awaiting them as their home and as a reward for what they have done
t.maariful: As for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for them there are gardens to dwell, as an honorable hospitality for what they used to do
t.khattab: As for those who believe and do good, they will have the Gardens of ˹Eternal˺ Residence—as an accommodation for what they used to do
t.ghali: As for the ones who have believed and done deeds of righteousness, then for them are the Gardens of Abode as quarters for whatever they were doing
t.irving: Those who believe and perform honorable deeds will have gardens with living quarters to relax in because of what they have been doing
t.iwq: As for those who believed and did good deeds, for them will be the Gardens of Refuge as accommodation for what they used to do

t_id.kemenag: Adapun orang-orang yang beriman dan mengerjakan amal saleh, maka bagi mereka jannah tempat kediaman, sebagai pahala terhadap apa yang mereka kerjakan.
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal saleh akan memperoleh surga-surga yang di dalamnya terdapat tempat tinggal mereka, sebagai penghormatan bagi mereka atas apa yang mereka lakukan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Adapun orang-orang yang beriman dan mengerjakan amal-amal saleh, maka bagi mereka surga tempat kediaman) arti kata nuzulan asalnya adalah tempat yang disediakan untuk para tamu (sebagai pahala terhadap apa yang telah mereka kerjakan.)
t_id.iwq: Adapun orang-orang yang beriman dan mengerjakan amal saleh, maka bagi mereka surga tempat kediaman, sebagai pahala terhadap apa yang mereka kerjakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أما الذين آمنوا وعملوا الصالحات فلهم جنات المأوى نزلا» هو ما يعد للضيف «بما كانوا يعملون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ فَلَهُمۡ جَنَّـٰتُ ٱلۡمَأۡوَىٰ نُزُلَۢا بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ (الْمَاوَى: الَّتِي يَاوُونَ إِلَيْهَا، وَيُقِيمُونَ بِهَا, نُزُلًا: ضِيَافَةً لَهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Adapun orang-orang yang beriman dan mengerjakan amal-amal saleh, maka bagi mereka surga tempat kediaman) arti kata nuzulan asalnya adalah tempat yang disediakan untuk para tamu (sebagai pahala terhadap apa yang telah mereka kerjakan)

ar: وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِینَ فَسَقُوا۟ فَمَأۡوَىٰهُمُ ٱلنَّارُۖ كُلَّمَاۤ أَرَادُوۤا۟ أَن یَخۡرُجُوا۟ مِنۡهَاۤ أُعِیدُوا۟ فِیهَا وَقِیلَ لَهُمۡ ذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ ٱلَّذِی كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ar_simple: وَأَمَّا الَّذِينَ فَسَقُوا فَمَأْوَاهُمُ النَّارُ ۖ كُلَّمَا أَرَادُوا أَنْ يَخْرُجُوا مِنْهَا أُعِيدُوا فِيهَا وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ ذُوقُوا عَذَابَ النَّارِ الَّذِي كُنْتُمْ بِهِ تُكَذِّبُونَ

t.sahih-int: But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they wish to emerge from it, they will be returned to it while it is said to them, "Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny
t.asad: but as for those who are lost in iniquity - their goal is the fire: as oft as they will try to come out of it, they will be thrown back into it; and they will be told, “Taste [now] this suffering through fire which you were wont to call a lie!”
t.yusuf-ali: As to those who are rebellious and wicked, their abode will be the Fire: every time they wish to get away therefrom, they will be forced thereinto, and it will be said to them: "Taste ye the Penalty of the Fire, the which ye were wont to reject as false
t.pickthall: And as for those who do evil, their retreat is the Fire. Whenever they desire to issue forth from thence, they are brought back thither. Unto them it is said: Taste the torment of the Fire which ye used to deny
t.arberry: But as for the ungodly, their refuge shall be the Fire; as often as they desire to come forth from it, they shall be restored into it, and it shall be said to them, 'Taste the chastisement of the Fire, which you cried lies to
t.hilali-khan: And as for those who are Fasiqun (disbelievers and disobedient to Allah), their abode will be the Fire, every time they wish to get away therefrom, they will be put back thereto, and it will be said to them: "Taste you the torment of the Fire which you used to deny
t.itani: But as for those who transgressed, their shelter is the Fire. Every time they try to get out of it, they will be brought back into it, and it will be said to them, “Taste the suffering of the Fire which you used to deny.”
t.mubarakpuri: And as for those who rebel, their abode will be the Fire, every time they wish to get away therefrom, they will be put back thereto, and it will be said to them: "Taste you the torment of the Fire which you used to deny."
t.qarib: But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they want to get out of it, they will be returned to it, while being told, "Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny
t.wahiduddin: As for those who defy God, their home shall be the Fire. Whenever they try to escape it, they shall be driven back into it, and they shall be told, "Taste the torment of the Fire, which you have persistently denied
t.shakir: And as for those who transgress, their abode is the fire; whenever they desire to go forth from it they shall be brought back into it, and it will be said to them: Taste the chastisement of the fire which you called a lie
t.haleem: As for those who defy God, their home will be the Fire. Whenever they try to escape it, they will be driven back into it, and they will be told, ‘Taste the torment of the Fire, which you persistently denied.’
t.maariful: And the ones who disobeyed, their abode is the Fire. Whenever they wish to come out from it, they will be turned back into it, and it will be said to them, “Taste the punishment of fire that you used to deny.”
t.khattab: But as for those who are rebellious, the Fire will be their home. Whenever they try to escape from it, they will be forced back into it, and will be told, “Taste the Fire’s torment, which you used to deny.”
t.ghali: And as for the ones who have been immoral, then their abode will be the Fire. Whenever they would (like) to go out of it, they will be brought back into it, and it will be said to them, "Taste the torment of the Fire, which you used to cry lies to
t.irving: Those who have been immoral will have the Fire as their lodging; every time they may want to leave it, they will be returned to it. They will be told: "Taste the torment of the Fire which you have been denying
t.iwq: But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they wish to emerge from it, they will be returned to it while it is said to them, "Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny

t_id.kemenag: Dan adapun orang-orang yang fasik (kafir) maka tempat mereka adalah jahannam. Setiap kali mereka hendak keluar daripadanya, mereka dikembalikan ke dalamnya dan dikatakan kepada mereka: "Rasakanlah siksa neraka yang dahulu kamu mendustakannya".
t_id.sabiq: Sedangkan orang-orang yang tidak taat kepada Allah dengan bersikap kufur kepada-Nya, maka tempat yang disediakan bagi mereka adalah neraka. Setiap kali mereka berusaha untuk keluar, mereka selalu dikembalikan. Kepada mereka dikatakan, "Rasakan azab neraka yang selalu kalian dustakan di dunia ini!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Adapun orang-orang yang fasik) disebabkan kekafiran mereka dan kedustaan yang mereka lakukan (maka tempat mereka adalah neraka. Setiap kali mereka hendak keluar daripadanya, mereka dikembalikan lagi ke dalamnya dan dikatakan kepada mereka, "Rasakanlah siksa neraka yang dahulu kalian mendustakannya.")
t_id.iwq: Dan adapun orang-orang yang fasik (kafir) maka tempat mereka adalah neraka. Setiap kali mereka hendak keluar daripadanya, mereka dikembalikan ke dalamnya dan dikatakan kepada mereka: "Rasakanlah siksa neraka yang dahulu kamu mendustakannya".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأما الذين فسقوا» بالكفر والتكذيب «فمأواهم النار كلما أرادوا أن يخرجوا منها أعيدوا فيها وقيل لهم ذوقوا عذاب النار الذي كنتم به تكذبون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ فَسَقُواْ فَمَأۡوَىٰهُمُ ٱلنَّارُۖ كُلَّمَآ أَرَادُوٓاْ أَن يَخۡرُجُواْ مِنۡهَآ أُعِيدُواْ فِيهَا وَقِيلَ لَهُمۡ ذُوقُواْ عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Adapun orang-orang yang fasik) disebabkan kekafiran mereka dan kedustaan yang mereka lakukan (maka tempat mereka adalah neraka. Setiap kali mereka hendak keluar daripadanya, mereka dikembalikan lagi ke dalamnya dan dikatakan kepada mereka, "Rasakanlah siksa neraka yang dahulu kalian mendustakannya)

ar: وَلَنُذِیقَنَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡأَدۡنَىٰ دُونَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡأَكۡبَرِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ یَرۡجِعُونَ
ar_simple: وَلَنُذِيقَنَّهُمْ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ الْأَدْنَىٰ دُونَ الْعَذَابِ الْأَكْبَرِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ

t.sahih-int: And we will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will repent
t.asad: However, ere [We condemn them to] that supreme suffering, We shall most certainly let them taste of a suffering closer at hand, so that they might [repent and] mend their ways
t.yusuf-ali: And indeed We will make them taste of the Penalty of this (life) prior to the supreme Penalty, in order that they may (repent and) return
t.pickthall: And verily We make them taste the lower punishment before the greater, that haply they may return
t.arberry: And We shall surely let them taste the nearer chastisement, before the greater; haply so they will return
t.hilali-khan: And verily, We will make them taste of the near torment (i.e. the torment in the life of this world, i.e. disasters, calamities, etc.) prior to the supreme torment (in the Hereafter), in order that they may (repent and) return (i.e. accept Islam)
t.itani: We will make them taste the lesser torment, prior to the greater torment, so that they may return.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, We will make them taste of the near lighter torment prior to the greater torment, in order that they may return.
t.qarib: However, We will first let them taste a lesser punishment [on earth] prior to the greater punishment, so that perhaps they may return [to the right path]
t.wahiduddin: And most surely We will make them taste a lesser punishment before the greater punishment, so that perhaps they may return to Us in repentance
t.shakir: And most certainly We will make them taste of the nearer chastisement before the greater chastisement that haply they may turn
t.haleem: We shall certainly make them taste a nearer torment [in this life] prior to the greater torment, so that perhaps they may return [to the right path]
t.maariful: And We will certainly make them taste the nearer punishment before the greater punishment, so that they may return
t.khattab: We will certainly make them taste some of the minor torment ˹in this life˺ before the major torment ˹of the Hereafter˺, so perhaps they will return ˹to the Right Path˺
t.ghali: And We will indeed let them definitely taste of the lowlier torment, (i.e., Punishment in this life) lesser (Or: other than) than the greater, that possibly they would return
t.irving: Still We shall let them taste worldly torment rather than supreme torment, so they may yet turn back
t.iwq: And we will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will repent

t_id.kemenag: Dan Sesungguhnya Kami merasakan kepada mereka sebahagian azab yang dekat (di dunia) sebelum azab yang lebih besar (di akhirat), mudah-mudahan mereka kembali (ke jalan yang benar).
t_id.sabiq: Dan Kami bersumpah, "Sungguh Kami akan menimpakan azab kehinaan bagi mereka di dunia sebelum mereka sampai kepada azab yang lebih besar, yaitu kekekalan di dalam neraka. Mudah-mudahan orang-orang yang diazab dengan azab yang lebih ringan itu bertobat dari kekufuran."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami merasakan kepada mereka sebagian azab yang dekat) yakni azab di dunia, seperti dibunuh, ditawan, ditimpa kekeringan dan paceklik serta dilanda wabah penyakit (selain) yakni sebelum (azab yang lebih besar) yaitu azab di akhirat (mudah-mudahan mereka) yaitu sebagian dari mereka yang masih ada (kembali) ke jalan yang benar, yaitu beriman.
t_id.iwq: Dan Sesungguhnya Kami merasakan kepada mereka sebahagian azab yang dekat (di dunia) sebelum azab yang lebih besar (di akhirat), mudah-mudahan mereka kembali (ke jalan yang benar).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولنذيقنهم من العذاب الأدنى» عذاب الدنيا بالقتل والأسر والجدب سنين والأمراض «دون» قبل «العذاب الأكبر» عذاب الآخرة «لعلهم» أي من بقي منهم «يرجعون» إلى الإيمان
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَنُذِيقَنَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡأَدۡنَىٰ دُونَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡأَكۡبَرِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ (الْعَذَابِ الْأَدْنَى: البَلَايَا وَالمَصَائِبِ فِي الدُّنْيَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami merasakan kepada mereka sebagian azab yang dekat) yakni azab di dunia, seperti dibunuh, ditawan, ditimpa kekeringan dan paceklik serta dilanda wabah penyakit (selain) yakni sebelum (azab yang lebih besar) yaitu azab di akhirat (mudah-mudahan mereka) yaitu sebagian dari mereka yang masih ada (kembali) ke jalan yang benar, yaitu beriman

ar: وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن ذُكِّرَ بِءَایَـٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ ثُمَّ أَعۡرَضَ عَنۡهَاۤۚ إِنَّا مِنَ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِینَ مُنتَقِمُونَ
ar_simple: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنْ ذُكِّرَ بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِ ثُمَّ أَعْرَضَ عَنْهَا ۚ إِنَّا مِنَ الْمُجْرِمِينَ مُنْتَقِمُونَ

t.sahih-int: And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his Lord; then he turns away from them? Indeed We, from the criminals, will take retribution
t.asad: And who could be more wicked than he to whom his Sustainer’s messages are conveyed and who thereupon turns away from them? Verily, We shall inflict Our retribution on those who are [thus] lost in sin
t.yusuf-ali: And who does more wrong than one to whom are recited the Signs of his Lord, and who then turns away therefrom? Verily from those who transgress We shall exact (due) Retribution
t.pickthall: And who doth greater wrong than he who is reminded of the revelations of his Lord, then turneth from them. Lo! We shall requite the guilty
t.arberry: And who does greater evil than he who is reminded of the signs of his Lord, then turns away from them? We shall take vengeance upon the sinners
t.hilali-khan: And who does more wrong than he who is reminded of the Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of his Lord, then he turns aside therefrom? Verily, We shall exact retribution from the Mujrimun (criminals, disbelievers, polytheists, sinners, etc)
t.itani: Who is more wrong than he, who, when reminded of his Lord’s revelations, turns away from them? We will certainly wreak vengeance upon the criminals.
t.mubarakpuri: And who does more wrong than he who is reminded of the Ayat of his Lord, then turns aside therefrom Verily, We shall exact retribution from the criminals.
t.qarib: Who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the signs of his Lord and then turns away from them? We will make those who force others to reject God's messages to pay a price
t.wahiduddin: Who does greater wrong than someone who, when revelations of his Lord are recited to him, turns away from them? We shall inflict retribution on the guilty
t.shakir: And who is more unjust than he who is reminded of the communications of his Lord, then he turns away from them? Surely We will give punishment to the guilty
t.haleem: Who does more wrong than someone who, when messages from his Lord are recited to him, turns away from them? We shall inflict retribution on the guilty
t.maariful: And who is more unjust than the one who was reminded of the verses of his Lord, then he turned away from them. Surely, We have to take vengeance upon the sinners
t.khattab: And who does more wrong than the one who is reminded of Allah’s revelations then turns away from them? We will surely inflict punishment upon the wicked
t.ghali: And who is more unjust than he who is reminded of the signs of his Lord, thereafter veers away from them? Surely We will be the Avengers against (Literally: avenge (Ourselves) the criminals
t.irving: Who is more in the wrong than someone who has been reminded of his Lord´s signs, then shuns them? We shall be Avenged on criminals
t.iwq: And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his Lord; then he turns away from them? Indeed We, from the criminals, will take retribution

t_id.kemenag: Dan siapakah yang lebih zalim daripada orang yang telah diperingatkan dengan ayat-ayat Tuhannya, kemudian ia berpaling daripadanya? Sesungguhnya Kami akan memberikan pembalasan kepada orang-orang yang berdosa.
t_id.sabiq: Tidak ada yang lebih berbuat sewenang-wenang terhadap diri sendiri dan terhadap kebenaran daripada manusia yang diingatkan tentang ayat dan bukti-bukti kebenaran Allah yang terang kemudian enggan mempercayai kebenarannya. Sungguh Kami akan menuntut balas pada orang-orang yang berbuat kejahatan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan siapakah yang lebih lalim daripada orang yang telah diperingatkan dengan ayat-ayat Rabbnya) yakni Alquran (kemudian ia berpaling daripadanya?) Yaitu tidak ada seorang pun yang lebih aniaya daripadanya. (Sesungguhnya Kami terhadap orang-orang yang berdosa) orang-orang musyrik (akan mengadakan pembalasan.)
t_id.iwq: Dan siapakah yang lebih zalim daripada orang yang telah diperingatkan dengan ayat-ayat Tuhannya, kemudian ia berpaling daripadanya? Sesungguhnya Kami akan memberikan pembalasan kepada orang-orang yang berdosa.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومن أظلم ممن ذُكِّرَ بآيات ربِّه» القرآن «ثم أعرض عنها» أي لا أحد أظلم منه «إنا من المجرمين» المشركين «منتقمون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن ذُكِّرَ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ ثُمَّ أَعۡرَضَ عَنۡهَآۚ إِنَّا مِنَ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ مُنتَقِمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan siapakah yang lebih lalim daripada orang yang telah diperingatkan dengan ayat-ayat Rabbnya) yakni Alquran (kemudian ia berpaling daripadanya?) Yaitu tidak ada seorang pun yang lebih aniaya daripadanya. (Sesungguhnya Kami terhadap orang-orang yang berdosa) orang-orang musyrik (akan mengadakan pembalasan)

ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَیۡنَا مُوسَى ٱلۡكِتَـٰبَ فَلَا تَكُن فِی مِرۡیَةࣲ مِّن لِّقَاۤئِهِۦۖ وَجَعَلۡنَـٰهُ هُدࣰى لِّبَنِیۤ إِسۡرَ ٰۤءِیلَ
ar_simple: وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا مُوسَى الْكِتَابَ فَلَا تَكُنْ فِي مِرْيَةٍ مِنْ لِقَائِهِ ۖ وَجَعَلْنَاهُ هُدًى لِبَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ

t.sahih-int: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so do not be in doubt over his meeting. And we made the Torah guidance for the Children of Israel
t.asad: AND, INDEED, [O Muhammad,] We did vouchsafe revelation unto Moses [as well]: so be not in doubt of [thy] having met with the same [truth in the revelation vouchsafed to thee]. And [just as] We caused that [earlier revelation] to be a guidance for the children of Israel
t.yusuf-ali: We did indeed aforetime give the Book to Moses: be not then in doubt of its reaching (thee): and We made it a guide to the Children of Israel
t.pickthall: We verily gave Moses the Scripture; so be not ye in doubt of his receiving it; and We appointed it a guidance for the Children of Israel
t.arberry: Indeed, We gave Moses the Book; so he not in doubt concerning the encounter with him; and We appointed it for a guidance to the Children of Israel
t.hilali-khan: And indeed We gave Musa (Moses) the Scripture [the Taurat (Torah)]. So be not you in doubt of meeting him [i.e. when you met Musa (Moses) during the night of Al-Isra' and Al-Mi'raj over the heavens]. And We made it [the Taurat (Torah)] a guide to the Children of Israel
t.itani: We gave Moses the Book; so do not be in doubt regarding His encounter; and We made it a guidance for the Children of Israel.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed We gave Musa the Scripture. So, be not you in doubt of meeting him. And We made it a guide to the Children of Israel.
t.qarib: We gave Moses the Book, so do not be in doubt that you are receiving the same [revelation]. And we made the Book guidance for the Children of Israel
t.wahiduddin: We gave Moses the Scripture, so [Muhammad] do not doubt that you are receiving it, just as We made it a guide for the Children of Israel
t.shakir: And certainly We gave the Book to Musa, so be not in doubt concerning the receiving of it, and We made it a guide for the children of Israel
t.haleem: We gave Moses the Scripture- so [Muhammad] do not doubt that you are receiving it- and We made it a guide for the Children of Israel
t.maariful: It is a fact that We gave the Book to Mūsā. So be not in doubt about receiving it, and We made it a guidance for the children of Isrā’īl
t.khattab: Indeed, We gave the Scripture to Moses—so let there be no doubt ˹O Prophet˺ that you ˹too˺ are receiving revelations—and We made it a guide for the Children of Israel
t.ghali: And indeed, We already brought Musa (Moses) the Book; so do not go into wrangling (This is addressed is the Prophet) about receiving it; and We made it for a guidance to the Seeds (Or: sons) of . Israel
t.irving: We gave Moses the Book, so do not be in any doubt about meeting it. We granted it to the Children of Israel for guidance
t.iwq: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so do not be in doubt over his meeting. And we made the Torah guidance for the Children of Israel

t_id.kemenag: Dan Sesungguhnya Kami telah berikan kepada Musa Al-Kitab (Taurat), maka janganlah kamu (Muhammad) ragu menerima (Al-Quran itu) dan Kami jadikan Al-Kitab (Taurat) itu petunjuk bagi Bani Israil.
t_id.sabiq: Kami benar-benar telah mewahyukan Taurât kepada Mûsâ, "Jangan engkau meragukan bahwa Mûsâ telah menerima kitab suci itu. Kami telah menjadikan kitab itu sebagai petunjuk bagi Banû Isrâ'îl.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami berikan kepada Musa Alkitab) yaitu kitab Taurat (maka janganlah kamu ragu-ragu) meragukan (untuk bertemu dengan Musa) dan keduanya telah berjumpa pada malam Rasulullah saw. diisrakan (dan Kami jadikan ia) Musa atau kitab Taurat (sebagai petunjuk) yaitu pemberi petunjuk (buat Bani Israel.)
t_id.iwq: Dan Sesungguhnya Kami telah berikan kepada Musa Al-Kitab (Taurat), maka janganlah kamu (Muhammad) ragu menerima (Al-Al-Quran itu) dan Kami jadikan Al-Kitab (Taurat) itu petunjuk bagi Bani Israil.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد آتينا موسى الكتاب» التوراة «فلا تكن في مِريةٍ» شكٍ «من لقائه» وقد التقيا ليلة الإسراء «وجعلناهُ» أي موسى أو الكتاب «هدىً» هاديا «لبني إسرائيل»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَى ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ فَلَا تَكُن فِي مِرۡيَةٖ مِّن لِّقَآئِهِۦۖ وَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ هُدٗى لِّبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ (مِرْيَةٍ: شَكٍّ, مِّن لِّقَائِهِ: لِقَاِء مُوسَى - عليه السلام - لَيْلَةَ الإِسْرَاءِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami berikan kepada Musa Alkitab) yaitu kitab Taurat (maka janganlah kamu ragu-ragu) meragukan (untuk bertemu dengan Musa) dan keduanya telah berjumpa pada malam Rasulullah saw. diisrakan (dan Kami jadikan ia) Musa atau kitab Taurat (sebagai petunjuk) yaitu pemberi petunjuk (buat Bani Israel)

ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ أَئِمَّةࣰ یَهۡدُونَ بِأَمۡرِنَا لَمَّا صَبَرُوا۟ۖ وَكَانُوا۟ بِءَایَـٰتِنَا یُوقِنُونَ
ar_simple: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا لَمَّا صَبَرُوا ۖ وَكَانُوا بِآيَاتِنَا يُوقِنُونَ

t.sahih-int: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and [when] they were certain of Our signs
t.asad: and [as] We raised among them leaders who, so long as they bore themselves with patience and had sure faith in Our messages, guided [their people] in accordance with Our behest [so, too, shall it be with the divine writ revealed unto thee, O Muhammad]
t.yusuf-ali: And We appointed, from among them, leaders, giving guidance under Our command, so long as they persevered with patience and continued to have faith in Our Signs
t.pickthall: And when they became steadfast and believed firmly in Our revelations, We appointed from among them leaders who guided by Our command
t.arberry: And We appointed from among them leaders guiding by Our command, when they endured patiently, and had sure faith in Our signs
t.hilali-khan: And We made from among them (Children of Israel), leaders, giving guidance under Our Command, when they were patient and used to believe with certainty in Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc)
t.itani: And We appointed leaders from among them, guiding by Our command, as long as they persevered and were certain of Our communications.
t.mubarakpuri: And We made from among them, leaders, giving guidance under Our command, when they were patient and used to believe with certainty in Our Ayat.
t.qarib: We raised leaders from among them who, as long as they were steadfast and believed firmly in Our messages, guided them according to Our command
t.wahiduddin: We appointed leaders from among them, guiding by Our command when they were steadfast and when they had firm faith in Our signs
t.shakir: And We made of them Imams to guide by Our command when they were patient, and they were certain of Our communications
t.haleem: When they became steadfast and believed firmly in Our messages, We raised leaders among them, guiding them according to Our command
t.maariful: And We appointed leaders from among them who guided (people) under Our command, when they observed patience, and kept firm belief in Our verses
t.khattab: We raised from among them leaders, guiding by Our command, when they patiently endured and firmly believed in Our signs
t.ghali: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our Command, since they (endured) patiently and had certitude in Our signs
t.irving: We even set some of them up as leaders to guide [people] at Our command, once they were patient and convinced about Our signs
t.iwq: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and when they were certain of Our signs

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami jadikan di antara mereka itu pemimpin-pemimpin yang memberi petunjuk dengan perintah Kami ketika mereka sabar. Dan adalah mereka meyakini ayat-ayat Kami.
t_id.sabiq: Kami telah mengangkat pemuka-pemuka agama dari kalangan Banû Isrâ'îl yang bertugas menyampaikan petunjuk Kami kepada manusia. Mereka melaksanakan tugas itu sebagai perwujudan dari perintah Kami pada mereka untuk tabah mengamalkan ajaran-ajaran Taurât. Mereka pun meyakini kebenaran ayat-ayat Kami dengan sepenuh hati.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami jadikan di antara mereka itu pemimpin-pemimpin) lafal ayat ini boleh dibaca tahqiq dan tashil (yang memberi petunjuk) kepada manusia (dengan perintah Kami ketika mereka sabar) di dalam memegang agama mereka dan sewaktu mereka menghadapi berbagai cobaan dari musuh-musuh mereka. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca limaa shabaruu. (Dan adalah mereka terhadap ayat-ayat Kami) yang menunjukkan kekuasaan dan keesaan Kami (orang-orang yang meyakini.)
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami jadikan di antara mereka itu pemimpin-pemimpin yang memberi petunjuk dengan perintah Kami ketika mereka sabar. Dan adalah mereka meyakini ayat-ayat Kami.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وجعلنا منهم أئمةً» بتحقيق الهمزتين وإبدال الثانية ياء: قادة «يهدون» الناس «بأمرنا لما صبروا» على دينهم وعلى البلاء من عدوهم، وفي قراءة بكسر اللام وتخفيف الميم «وكانوا بآياتنا» الدالة على قدرتنا ووحدانيتنا «يوقنون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ أَئِمَّةٗ يَهۡدُونَ بِأَمۡرِنَا لَمَّا صَبَرُواْۖ وَكَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا يُوقِنُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami jadikan di antara mereka itu pemimpin-pemimpin) lafal ayat ini boleh dibaca tahqiq dan tashil (yang memberi petunjuk) kepada manusia (dengan perintah Kami ketika mereka sabar) di dalam memegang agama mereka dan sewaktu mereka menghadapi berbagai cobaan dari musuh-musuh mereka. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca limaa shabaruu. (Dan adalah mereka terhadap ayat-ayat Kami) yang menunjukkan kekuasaan dan keesaan Kami (orang-orang yang meyakini)

ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ یَفۡصِلُ بَیۡنَهُمۡ یَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِیَـٰمَةِ فِیمَا كَانُوا۟ فِیهِ یَخۡتَلِفُونَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فِيمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ

t.sahih-int: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ
t.asad: VERILY, it is God alone who will decide between men on Resurrection Day with regard to all on which they were wont to differ
t.yusuf-ali: Verily thy Lord will judge between them on the Day of Judgment, in the matters wherein they differ (among themselves)
t.pickthall: Lo! thy Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that wherein they used to differ
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord will distinguish between them on the Resurrection Day, touching that whereon they were at variance
t.hilali-khan: Verily, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection, concerning that wherein they used to differ
t.itani: Your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection regarding everything they had disputed.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection, concerning that wherein they used to differ.
t.qarib: Your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection regarding their differences
t.wahiduddin: Surely your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that wherein they used to differ
t.shakir: Surely your Lord will judge between them on the day of resurrection concerning that wherein they differ
t.haleem: [Prophet], it is your Lord who will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning their differences
t.maariful: Surely, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Judgment in what they used to differ
t.khattab: Indeed, your Lord will decide between them on the Day of Judgment regarding their differences
t.ghali: Surely your Lord is He Who will distinguish between them on the Day of the Resurrection concerning that wherein they used to differ
t.irving: Your Lord will sort them out on Resurrection Day concerning whatever they have been differing over
t.iwq: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Rising concerning that over which they used to differ

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Dialah yang memberikan keputusan di antara mereka pada hari kiamat tentang apa yang selalu mereka perselisihkan padanya.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya hanya Tuhanmu yang akan memberikan keputusan nanti di hari kiamat persoalan- persoalan yang diperselisihkan antara para nabi dan kaumnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu Dialah yang memberikan keputusan di antara mereka pada hari kiamat tentang apa yang selalu mereka perselisihkan padanya) yakni perkara agama.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Dialah yang memberikan keputusan di antara mereka pada hari kiamat tentang apa yang selalu mereka perselisihkan padanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن ربك هو يفصل بينهم يوم القيامة فيما كانوا فيه يختلفون» من أمر الدين
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَفۡصِلُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ فِيمَا كَانُواْ فِيهِ يَخۡتَلِفُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu Dialah yang memberikan keputusan di antara mereka pada hari kiamat tentang apa yang selalu mereka perselisihkan padanya) yakni perkara agama

ar: أَوَ لَمۡ یَهۡدِ لَهُمۡ كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرُونِ یَمۡشُونَ فِی مَسَـٰكِنِهِمۡۚ إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَـٰتٍۚ أَفَلَا یَسۡمَعُونَ
ar_simple: أَوَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِنْ قَبْلِهِمْ مِنَ الْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِي مَسَاكِنِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ ۖ أَفَلَا يَسْمَعُونَ

t.sahih-int: Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, [as] they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs; then do they not hear
t.asad: [But] can, then, they [who deny the truth] learn no lesson by recalling how many a generation We have destroyed before their time? [people] in whose dwelling-places they [themselves now] walk about? In this, behold, there are messages indeed: will they not, then, listen
t.yusuf-ali: Does it not teach them a lesson, how many generations We destroyed before them, in whose dwellings they (now) go to and fro? Verily in that are Signs: Do they not then listen
t.pickthall: Is it not a guidance for them (to observe) how many generations We destroyed before them, amid whose dwelling places they do walk? Lo! therein verily are portents! Will they not then heed
t.arberry: Is it not a guidance to them, how many generations We destroyed before them in whose dwelling-places they walk? Surely in that are signs; what, will they not hear
t.hilali-khan: Is it not a guidance for them, how many generations We have destroyed before them in whose dwellings they do walk about? Verily, therein indeed are signs. Would they not then listen
t.itani: Is it not a lesson for them, how many generations We have destroyed before them, in whose habitations they walk? Surely in that are signs. Do they not hear?
t.mubarakpuri: Is it not a guidance for them: how many generations We have destroyed before them in whose dwellings they do walk about Verily, therein indeed are signs. Would they not then listen
t.qarib: Hasn't it become clear to them yet how many generations We destroyed before them, through whose ruined homes they now walk? In that are signs; don't they listen
t.wahiduddin: Does it not guide them [to see] how many generations We destroyed before them, among whose ruined dwellings they now walk about? There truly are signs in this -- will they not listen
t.shakir: Does it not point out to them the right way, how many of the generations, in whose abodes they go about, did We destroy before them? Most surely there are signs in this; will they not then hear
t.haleem: Is it not a lesson for them [to see] how many generations We destroyed before them, in whose homes they now walk? There truly are signs in this- do they not hear
t.maariful: Has it not been a source of guidance for them as to how many generations We have destroyed before them who used to walk in their dwellings? Surely in this there are signs. So, do they not listen
t.khattab: Is it not yet clear to them how many peoples We destroyed before them, whose ruins they still pass by? Surely in this are signs. Will they not then listen
t.ghali: And is it not a guidance for them, (i.e., Does not (Punishment) guide them?) how many generations We caused to perish even before them, in whose dwellings they walk? Surely in that are indeed signs; will they not then hear
t.irving: Does it not guide them [when they notice] how many generations We have wiped out before them whose dwellings they now walk around in? That contains signs, so will they not listen
t.iwq: Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, as they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs; then do they not hear

t_id.kemenag: Dan apakah tidak menjadi petunjuk bagi mereka, berapa banyak umat sebelum mereka yang telah Kami binasakan sedangkan mereka sendiri berjalan di tempat-tempat kediaman mereka itu. Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah). Maka apakah mereka tidak mendengarkan?
t_id.sabiq: Apakah Allah akan membiarkan begitu saja orang-orang yang mendustakan para rasul tanpa memberikan penjelasan kepada mereka bahwa Dia telah membinasakan umat-umat terdahulu, padahal para pendusta Muhammad itu telah pernah melewati negeri tempat tinggal mereka? Sungguh, pada peninggalan mereka itu terdapat pelajaran yang menunjukkan kebenaran. Tetapi, apakah mereka tuli sehingga tidak bisa menyimak pelajaran itu?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apakah tidak menjadi petunjuk bagi mereka, berapa banyak umat-umat sebelum mereka yang telah Kami binasakan) maksudnya apakah tidak jelas bagi orang-orang kafir Mekah, bahwasanya Kami telah banyak membinasakan umat-umat sebelum mereka disebabkan kekafirannya (sedangkan mereka sendiri berjalan) lafal ayat ini berkedudukan sebagai hal atau kata keterangan keadaan bagi dhamir lahum (di tempat-tempat kediaman mereka itu) sewaktu mereka mengadakan perjalanan ke negeri Syam dan negeri-negeri lainnya, yakni apakah mereka tidak mengambil pelajaran daripadanya. (Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu terdapat tanda-tanda) yang menunjukkan akan kekuasaan Kami. (Maka apakah mereka tidak mendengarkan) dengan pendengaran yang penuh perhatian dan mau menerima apa yang didengarnya?
t_id.iwq: Dan apakah tidak menjadi petunjuk bagi mereka, berapa banyak umat sebelum mereka yang telah Kami binasakan sedangkan mereka sendiri berjalan di tempat-tempat kediaman mereka itu. Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah). Maka apakah mereka tidak mendengarkan?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أو لم يهدِ لهم كم أهلكنا من قبلهم» أي يتبيَّن لكفار مكة إهلاكنا كثيرا «من القرون» الأمم بكفرهم «يمشون» حال من ضمير لهم «في مساكنهم» في أسفارهم إلى الشام وغيرها فيعتبروا «إن في ذلك لآيات» دلالات على قدرتنا «أفلا يسمعون» سماع تدبر واتعاظ
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَهۡدِ لَهُمۡ كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرُونِ يَمۡشُونَ فِي مَسَٰكِنِهِمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٍۚ أَفَلَا يَسۡمَعُونَ (أَوَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ: أَوَلَمْ يَتَبَيَّنْ لِهَؤُلَاءِ الُمَكِّذِبينَ؟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا: مَا أَكْثَرَ إِهْلَاكَنَا! مِّنَ الْقُرُونِ: مِنَ الأُمَمِ السَّابِقَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apakah tidak menjadi petunjuk bagi mereka, berapa banyak umat-umat sebelum mereka yang telah Kami binasakan) maksudnya apakah tidak jelas bagi orang-orang kafir Mekah, bahwasanya Kami telah banyak membinasakan umat-umat sebelum mereka disebabkan kekafirannya (sedangkan mereka sendiri berjalan) lafal ayat ini berkedudukan sebagai hal atau kata keterangan keadaan bagi dhamir lahum (di tempat-tempat kediaman mereka itu) sewaktu mereka mengadakan perjalanan ke negeri Syam dan negeri-negeri lainnya, yakni apakah mereka tidak mengambil pelajaran daripadanya. (Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu terdapat tanda-tanda) yang menunjukkan akan kekuasaan Kami. (Maka apakah mereka tidak mendengarkan) dengan pendengaran yang penuh perhatian dan mau menerima apa yang didengarnya

ar: أَوَ لَمۡ یَرَوۡا۟ أَنَّا نَسُوقُ ٱلۡمَاۤءَ إِلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلۡجُرُزِ فَنُخۡرِجُ بِهِۦ زَرۡعࣰا تَأۡكُلُ مِنۡهُ أَنۡعَـٰمُهُمۡ وَأَنفُسُهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا یُبۡصِرُونَ
ar_simple: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا أَنَّا نَسُوقُ الْمَاءَ إِلَى الْأَرْضِ الْجُرُزِ فَنُخْرِجُ بِهِ زَرْعًا تَأْكُلُ مِنْهُ أَنْعَامُهُمْ وَأَنْفُسُهُمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يُبْصِرُونَ

t.sahih-int: Have they not seen that We drive the water [in clouds] to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and [they] themselves? Then do they not see
t.asad: Are they not aware that it is We who drive the rain onto dry land devoid of herbage, and thereby bring forth herbage of which their cattle and they themselves do eat? Can they not, then, see [the truth of resurrection]
t.yusuf-ali: And do they not see that We do drive rain to parched soil (bare of herbage), and produce therewith crops, providing food for their cattle and themselves? Have they not the vision
t.pickthall: Have they not seen how We lead the water to the barren land and therewith bring forth crops whereof their cattle eat, and they themselves? Will they not then see
t.arberry: Have they not seen how We drive the water to the dry land and bring forth crops therewith whereof their cattle and themselves eat? What, will they not see
t.hilali-khan: Have they not seen how We drive water (rain clouds) to the dry land without any vegetation, and therewith bring forth crops providing food for their cattle and themselves? Will they not then see
t.itani: Do they not see how We conduct the water to a dry land, and with it We produce vegetation, from which their livestock eat, and themselves? Do they not see?
t.mubarakpuri: Have they not seen how We drive water to the dry land that has no vegetation, and therewith bring forth crops providing food for their cattle and themselves Will they not then see
t.qarib: Have they not seen that We drive rain to barren land and bring forth vegetation from which they and their livestock eat? Do they not see
t.wahiduddin: Have they not seen that We drive the water to the barren land and produce thereby crops of which their cattle and they themselves eat? Will they not then see
t.shakir: Do they not see that We drive the water to a land having no herbage, then We bring forth thereby seed-produce of which their cattle and they themselves eat; will they not then see
t.haleem: Do they not consider how We drive rain to the barren land, and with it produce vegetation from which their cattle and they themselves eat? Do they not see
t.maariful: Have they not seen that We drive water to the dry land, then We bring forth crops thereby from which their cattle and they themselves have food? So, do they not perceive
t.khattab: Do they not see how We drive rain to parched land, producing ˹various˺ crops from which they and their cattle eat? Will they not then see
t.ghali: And have they not seen that We drive the water to the arid land, so We bring out plantation therewith with which their cattle (includes cattle, camels, sheep and goats) and themselves eat? Will they not then behold
t.irving: Have they not seen how We drive along water for the parched earth and bring forth crops with it so your livestock and they themselves may eat by means of it? Will they not observe
t.iwq: Have they not seen that We drive the water in clouds to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and they themselves? Then do they not see

t_id.kemenag: Dan apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan, bahwasanya Kami menghalau (awan yang mengandung) air ke bumi yang tandus, lalu Kami tumbuhkan dengan air hujan itu tanaman yang daripadanya makan hewan ternak mereka dan mereka sendiri. Maka apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan?
t_id.sabiq: Apakah penglihatan mereka benar-benar buta dan tidak bisa melihat bahwa Kami mengalirkan air hujan--melalui sungai--menuju tanah yang tak berpepohonan? Lalu, dengan air itu, Kami menumbuhkan tanaman yang menjadi makanan hewan ternak, sementara mereka sendiri memakan buah dan bijinya? Sekali lagi, apakah mereka buta sehingga tidak dapat menyaksikan bukti-bukti kekuasaan Allah menghidupkan orang mati?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan, bahwasanya Kami menghalau awan yang mengandung air ke bumi yang tandus) yakni bumi yang tidak ada tumbuh-tumbuhan padanya (lalu Kami tumbuhkan dengan air hujan itu tanam-tanaman yang daripadanya dapat makan binatang-binatang ternak mereka dan mereka sendiri. Maka apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan?) hal tersebut sehingga menuntun mereka untuk mengetahui, bahwa Kami mampu untuk mengembalikan mereka hidup kembali sesudah mereka mati nanti.
t_id.iwq: Dan apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan, bahwasanya Kami menghalau (awan yang mengandung) air ke bumi yang tandus, lalu Kami tumbuhkan dengan air hujan itu tanaman yang daripadanya makan hewan ternak mereka dan mereka sendiri. Maka apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أو لم يروا أنا نسوق الماء إلى الأرض الجرز» اليابسة التي لا نبات فيها «فنخرج به زرعا تأكل منه أنعامهم وأنفسهم أفلا يبصرون» هذا فيعلمون أنا نقدر على إعادتهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ أَنَّا نَسُوقُ ٱلۡمَآءَ إِلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلۡجُرُزِ فَنُخۡرِجُ بِهِۦ زَرۡعٗا تَأۡكُلُ مِنۡهُ أَنۡعَٰمُهُمۡ وَأَنفُسُهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا يُبۡصِرُونَ (الْجُرُزِ: اليَابِسَةِ، الغَلِيظَةِ الَّتِي لَا نَبَاتَ فِيهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan, bahwasanya Kami menghalau awan yang mengandung air ke bumi yang tandus) yakni bumi yang tidak ada tumbuh-tumbuhan padanya (lalu Kami tumbuhkan dengan air hujan itu tanam-tanaman yang daripadanya dapat makan binatang-binatang ternak mereka dan mereka sendiri. Maka apakah mereka tidak memperhatikan?) hal tersebut sehingga menuntun mereka untuk mengetahui, bahwa Kami mampu untuk mengembalikan mereka hidup kembali sesudah mereka mati nanti

ar: وَیَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلۡفَتۡحُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَـٰدِقِینَ
ar_simple: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا الْفَتْحُ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ صَادِقِينَ

t.sahih-int: And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful
t.asad: But they answer: “When will that final decision take place, if what you [believers] say is true?”
t.yusuf-ali: They say: "When will this decision be, if ye are telling the truth
t.pickthall: And they say: When cometh this victory (of yours) if ye are truthful
t.arberry: They also say, 'When shall be this Victory, if you speak truly
t.hilali-khan: They say: "When will this Al-Fath (Decision) be (between us and you, i.e. the Day of Resurrection), if you are telling the truth
t.itani: And they say, “When is this victory, if you are truthful?”
t.mubarakpuri: They say: "When will this Fath be, if you are telling the truth"
t.qarib: They say, "When will this judgment be, if you are telling the truth
t.wahiduddin: And they say, "When will this judgement come, if you are telling the truth
t.shakir: And they say: When will this judgment take place, If you are truthful
t.haleem: And they say, ‘When will this Decision be, if you are telling the truth?’
t.maariful: And they say, “When will this decision take place if you are truthful (in your claim)?”
t.khattab: They ask ˹mockingly˺, “When is this ˹Day of final˺ Decision, if what you say is true?”
t.ghali: And they say, "When will be this Conquest (of yours), in case you are sincere
t.irving: They say: "When will this victory be if you are so truthful
t.iwq: And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful

t_id.kemenag: Dan mereka bertanya: "Bilakah kemenangan itu (datang) jika kamu memang orang-orang yang benar?"
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang musyrik berkata kepadamu dan kepada orang-orang yang beriman, "Kapan Allah akan membukakan pintu kemenangan bagi kalian? Katakan kepada kami bila janji itu akan terpenuhi, jika kalian orang yang jujur."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka bertanya) kepada orang-orang yang beriman ("Bilakah kemenangan itu) datang bagi kalian atas kami (jika kalian memang orang-orang yang benar?")
t_id.iwq: Dan mereka bertanya: "Bilakah kemenangan itu (datang) jika kamu memang orang-orang yang benar?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ويقولون» للمؤمنين «متى هذا الفتح» بيننا وبينكم «إن كنتم صادقين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡفَتۡحُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ (الْفَتْحُ: يَوْمُ العَذَابِ الَّذِي تَعِدُونَنَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka bertanya) kepada orang-orang yang beriman ("Bilakah kemenangan itu) datang bagi kalian atas kami (jika kalian memang orang-orang yang benar)

ar: قُلۡ یَوۡمَ ٱلۡفَتۡحِ لَا یَنفَعُ ٱلَّذِینَ كَفَرُوۤا۟ إِیمَـٰنُهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ یُنظَرُونَ
ar_simple: قُلْ يَوْمَ الْفَتْحِ لَا يَنْفَعُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا إِيمَانُهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنْظَرُونَ

t.sahih-int: Say, [O Muhammad], "On the Day of Conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them, nor will they be reprieved
t.asad: Say: “On the Day of the Final Decision, their [newly-found] faith will be of no use to those who [in their lifetime] were bent on denying the truth, nor will they be granted respite!” –
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "On the Day of Decision, no profit will it be to Unbelievers if they (then) believe! nor will they be granted a respite
t.pickthall: Say (unto them): On the day of the victory the faith of those who disbelieve (and who then will believe) will not avail them, neither will they be reprieved
t.arberry: Say: 'On the Day of Victory their faith shall not profit the unbelievers, nor shall they be respited
t.hilali-khan: Say: "On the Day of Al-Fath (Decision), no profit will it be to those who disbelieve if they (then) believe! Nor will they be granted a respite
t.itani: Say, “On the day of victory, the faith of those who disbelieved will be of no avail to them, and they will not be granted respite.”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "On the Day of Al-Fath, no profit will it be to those who disbelieve if they (then) believe! Nor will they be granted a respite."
t.qarib: Say, "On the Day of Judgment, it will be of no use for the unbelievers to believe, nor will they be given amnesty
t.wahiduddin: Say, "On the Day of Judgement it will be of no benefit to those who were bent on denying the truth, if they [then] believe! They will be granted no respite
t.shakir: Say: On the day of judgment the faith of those who (now) disbelieve will not profit them, nor will they be respited
t.haleem: Say, ‘On the Day of Decision it will be no use for the disbelievers to believe; they will be granted no respite.’
t.maariful: Say, “On the day of decision their belief will not be of any use to disbelievers, nor shall they be given any respite.”
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “On the Day of Decision it will not benefit the disbelievers to believe then, nor will they be delayed ˹from punishment˺.”
t.ghali: Say, "On the Day of the Conquest the belief of the ones who have disbelieved will not profit them, and they will not be respited
t.irving: SAY: "On the day of victory their [profession of] faith will not benefit those who have disbelieved, nor will they be allowed to wait
t.iwq: Say, O Muhammad, "On the Day of Conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them, nor will they be reprieved

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Pada hari kemenangan itu tidak berguna bagi orang-orang kafir, iman mereka dan tidak pula mereka diberi tangguh".
t_id.sabiq: Katakan kepada mereka, wahai Muhammad, "Jika waktu pengadilan dan keputusan itu telah tiba, keimanan orang-orang kafir tidak akan ada gunanya lagi. Mereka tidak akan mendapatkan tangguhan waktu untuk menerima siksa, walau sekejap saja."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah, "Pada hari kemenangan itu) yaitu pada hari turunnya azab atas mereka (tidak berguna bagi orang-orang kafir iman mereka dan tidak pula mereka diberi tangguh") ditangguhkan supaya mereka dapat bertobat atau meminta maaf.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Pada hari kemenangan itu tidak berguna bagi orang-orang kafir, iman mereka dan tidak pula mereka diberi tangguh".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل يوم الفتح» بإنزال العذاب بهم «لا ينفع الذين كفروا إيمانهم ولا هم ينظرون» يمهلون لتوبة أو معذرة
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡفَتۡحِ لَا يَنفَعُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِيمَٰنُهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنظَرُونَ (يُنظَرُونَ: يُمْهَلُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah, "Pada hari kemenangan itu) yaitu pada hari turunnya azab atas mereka (tidak berguna bagi orang-orang kafir iman mereka dan tidak pula mereka diberi tangguh") ditangguhkan supaya mereka dapat bertobat atau meminta maaf

ar: فَأَعۡرِضۡ عَنۡهُمۡ وَٱنتَظِرۡ إِنَّهُم مُّنتَظِرُونَ
ar_simple: فَأَعْرِضْ عَنْهُمْ وَانْتَظِرْ إِنَّهُمْ مُنْتَظِرُونَ

t.sahih-int: So turn away from them and wait. Indeed, they are waiting
t.asad: and then leave them alone, and wait [for the truth to unfold as] they, behold, are waiting
t.yusuf-ali: So turn away from them, and wait: they too are waiting
t.pickthall: So withdraw from them (O Muhammad), and await (the event). Lo! they (also) are awaiting (it)
t.arberry: So turn thou away from them, and wait; they too are waiting
t.hilali-khan: So turn aside from them (O Muhammad SAW) and await, verily they (too) are awaiting
t.itani: So turn away from them, and wait. They too are waiting.
t.mubarakpuri: So turn aside from them and await, verily, they (too) are awaiting.
t.qarib: So turn away from them and wait. They are waiting
t.wahiduddin: So turn away from them and wait. They too are waiting
t.shakir: Therefore turn away from them and wait, surely they too are waiting
t.haleem: So [Prophet], turn away from them and wait: they too are waiting
t.maariful: So, just ignore them (O prophet,) and wait. They (too) are waiting
t.khattab: So turn away from them, and wait! They too are waiting
t.ghali: So veer away from them, and wait; surely they (too) are waiting
t.irving: Shun them and wait; they will be waiting too
t.iwq: Thus turn away from them and wait. Indeed, they are waiting

t_id.kemenag: Maka berpalinglah kamu dari mereka dan tunggulah, sesungguhnya mereka (juga) menunggu.
t_id.sabiq: Jika ejekan itu telah menjadi watak, palingkan dirimu dari mereka. Nantikan kebenaran janji Tuhan padamu, sementara mereka menunggu-nunggu kesempatan untuk dapat mengalahkanmu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka berpalinglah kamu dari mereka dan tunggulah) saat turunnya azab atas mereka (sesungguhnya mereka juga menunggu)mu, kapan kamu mati atau terbunuh, sehingga mereka bebas darimu. Ayat ini diturunkan sebelum ada perintah Allah swt. untuk memerangi mereka.
t_id.iwq: Maka berpalinglah kamu dari mereka dan tunggulah, sesungguhnya mereka (juga) menunggu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأعرض عنهم وانتظر» إنزال العذاب بهم «إنهم منتظرون» بك حادث موت أو قتل فيستريحون منك، وهذا قبل الأمر بقتالهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَعۡرِضۡ عَنۡهُمۡ وَٱنتَظِرۡ إِنَّهُم مُّنتَظِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka berpalinglah kamu dari mereka dan tunggulah) saat turunnya azab atas mereka (sesungguhnya mereka juga menunggu)mu, kapan kamu mati atau terbunuh, sehingga mereka bebas darimu. Ayat ini diturunkan sebelum ada perintah Allah swt. untuk memerangi mereka
